title: pilosella duplex
intro: Pilosella duplex, also known as the Mouse-Ear Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pilosella duplex include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in topical creams and ointments for various skin conditions.
